articles.title: What's at risk if SCOTUS sides with Trump in birthright citizenship case - Axios
articles.description: The Supreme Court's decision could decide who gets to be an American.
articles.content: Threat level: Trump's order which limits citizenship to children born in the U.S. with at least one parent legally in the country would bar entire swaths of children from work authorization, certain … [+3271 chars]
